---
title: "Introductory Econometrics with Recitation: TA Session Week 8"
author: "Danny Po-Hsien Kang"
date: "April 14, 2026"
output: html_document
---

## Text Formatting

In R Markdown, you write your text using **Markdown syntax**.

For example,

$$
\text{AWE} = \beta_0 + \sum_{i=1}^3 \beta_i X_i + u
$$

**Headings:**

# Heading 1 (Big Title)

## Heading 2 (Section)

### Heading 3 (Subsection)

**Bold and Italics:**

*Italic text* **Bold text**

**Lists and numbers:**

-   Item 1
-   Item 2
    -   Sub-item 2.1

1.  First item
2.  Second item
    1.  Sub-item 2.1

**Links:**

[Link to Google](https://www.google.com)

## R Code Chunks

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
birth <- read.csv(here("data", "ncbirths.csv"))
summary(birth$weight)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
ggplot(birth, aes(x = weeks, y = weight)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2.5) +
  labs(
    x = "Birth Weeks",
    y = "Baby Weight (pounds)"
  )

```
